mutti-family-villas.label: Mutti Family Villas
mutti-family-villas.paymentPlan: Progressive to handover: 2% reservation, 28% contract signing, 15% foundation, 15% concrete structure, 10% wall/roof, 10% finishes/furniture, 10% handover, 10% after transfer. 5% discount if paying 90% at reservation. Freehold 6.6% / Leasehold 1.1% taxes split 50/50.
mutti-family-villas.feesNote: Maintenance + sinking fund vary by villa type.

silhouette-by-the-zero.label: Silhouette by The Zero
silhouette-by-the-zero.paymentPlan: Transfer fee payable 50/50 buyer/seller. Common fee 80 THB/sqm/month annually. Sinking fund 800 THB/sqm one-time. Electric/water installation max 20,000 THB. Freehold fee 300,000–600,000 THB.

the-zero-bang-tao.label: The Zero Bang Tao
the-zero-bang-tao.paymentPlan: Transfer fee payable 50/50 buyer/seller. Common fee 80 THB/sqm/month annually. Sinking fund 800 THB/sqm one-time. Electric/water installation max 20,000 THB. Freehold fee 450,000–700,000 THB.

layan-lucky-villas.label: Layan Lucky Villas
layan-lucky-villas.paymentPlan: Prices valid until 31 August 2026. Transfer fee payable 50/50 buyer/seller. Payments in THB only. Exchange reference 32.5 THB/USD (05 May 2026). Developer may change details without notice.

4-bed-villa.label: 4-bed villa
4-bed-villa.notes: Most villas sold. Available: L5 (THB 67.8M, under construction), L15 (THB 47.6M, under construction).
